title: Biodun Adedipe to Deliver Keynote Speech at SUPERNEWS Nigeria SMEs Confab June 13 - FinancialEDGE
description: Dr. Biodun Adedipe, Founder and Chief Consultant of B. Adedipe Accociates Limited will deliver the keynote speech at the SUPERNEWS Nigeria SMEs Confab 2024 scheduled to hold on 13th June, 2024 at Radisson Hotel, GRA Ikeja, Lagos at 10am prompt. Adedipe will deliver a paper on 'Bringing SMEs into the Financial Services Network via Fintech'
html: Dr. Biodun Adedipe, Founder and Chief Consultant of B. Adedipe Accociates Limited will deliver the keynote speech at the SUPERNEWS Nigeria SMEs Confab 2024 scheduled to hold on 13th June, 2024 at Radisson Hotel, GRA Ikeja, Lagos at 10am prompt.
